creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Tue Jul 17 11:34:49 2012
New Revision: 301000
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301000

Log:
  - Update to 0.8 [1]
  - Add LICENSE (Artistic 1 & GPL 1)
  - Update p5-Dancer dependency minimum version requirements
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Dancer-Plugin-Feed/Changes
  PR:		ports/169859 [1]
  Submitted by:	Grzegorz Blach <magik@roorback.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/Makefile
  head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/distinfo

Modified: head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/Makefile	Tue Jul 17 11:06:04 2012	(r300999)
+++ head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/Makefile	Tue Jul 17 11:34:49 2012	(r301000)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	Dancer-Plugin-Feed
-PORTVERSION=	0.7
+PORTVERSION=	0.8
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -14,7 +14,10 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	magik@roorback.net
 COMMENT=	Dancer plugin for generating RSS or Atom feeds
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Dancer>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Dancer \
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Dancer>=1.2001:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Dancer \
 		p5-XML-Feed>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Feed
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 

Modified: head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/distinfo	Tue Jul 17 11:06:04 2012	(r300999)
+++ head/www/p5-Dancer-Plugin-Feed/distinfo	Tue Jul 17 11:34:49 2012	(r301000)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Dancer-Plugin-Feed-0.7.tar.gz) = 030bcef3d38ca9516f2a00a455a8d1dc736dec3c5c663c51760d8b301135e4cc
-SIZE (Dancer-Plugin-Feed-0.7.tar.gz) = 11397
+SHA256 (Dancer-Plugin-Feed-0.8.tar.gz) = 786b6990fe1c1dd52e7da5def6ec635812175b188dc6a9b48be6d61d31b5f759
+SIZE (Dancer-Plugin-Feed-0.8.tar.gz) = 11474
